ICT Support Services > Services

Our Services

We are committed to continue working in tandem with the management, staff and students in offering support on innovations as well as offering ICT support to various sections of the university to enable them deliver on their promise to our clients.

Support Services

Support

ICT Support

The directorate provides comprehensive ICT-related support to both staff and students, available through in-person consultations and our 24/7 online portal.

Training

ICT Training

Continuous training on ERP systems, student and staff portals, and the Online Learning Management System to ensure digital literacy across the university.

Infrastructure

Hardware

Hardware Acquisition

Facilitating the acquisition of high-performance computers, printers, and modern projectors to support teaching, research, and administration.

Facilities

ICT Laboratories

Access modern computer labs in Tuition Block I, Research & Office Block, and Digital Libraries, equipped with high-speed specialized software.

Connectivity

Network

Broadband & Wi-Fi

Free high-speed internet across all campuses. Strategic Wi-Fi hotspots are located at hostels, libraries, and common student gathering areas.

24/7
Support Available
5+
Computer Labs
100%
Campus Coverage

ICT Support Services

What can we help you with?

Wi-Fi and Network

Connectivity issues, access points, configuration

Corporate Email

Email setup, password reset, access issues

Elearning Support

LMS access, course materials, online classes

Hardware | Software Support

Device issues, software installation, troubleshooting

Website | Database Support

Website errors, database access, system issues

Student | Staff Portal

Login issues, portal access, profile updates

Units Registration | Corrections

Course registration, unit corrections, academic records

Maintenance

Equipment repair, system updates, technical maintenance
